message:
feat(tldr): promote DCG, RU, ACFS to core tools and optimize mobile experience

Major update to the /tldr page addressing tool categorization accuracy,
mobile usability, and copy quality.

Tool Recategorization:
- Destructive Command Guard (DCG): supporting → core
  Safety-critical tool that prevents catastrophic commands from agents
- Repo Updater (RU): supporting → core
  Essential for managing multi-repo flywheel setups
- Flywheel Setup (ACFS): supporting → core
  The bootstrap tool that installs the entire ecosystem

Now 10 core tools + 3 supporting utilities (was 7+6).

Hero & Stats Updates:
- Stats now show "Core Tools: 10" instead of "Tools: 13"
- Description: "10 core tools and 3 supporting utilities..."
- Updated coreDescription to mention safety, sync, and setup
- Updated supportingDescription for remaining tools (GIIL, XF, s2p)

Mobile Optimization:
- tldr/page.tsx: Added overflow-x-hidden to prevent horizontal scroll
- tldr/page.tsx: Wrapped curl command in scrollable container
- tldr-hero.tsx: Hidden floating icons on mobile (prevent overflow)
- tldr-hero.tsx: Hidden decorative grid on small screens
- tldr-hero.tsx: Responsive typography (text-3xl → sm:text-4xl → md:text-6xl)
- tldr-tool-card.tsx: Smaller icons, padding, typography on mobile
- tldr-tool-card.tsx: Touch-friendly 44px+ tap targets
- tldr-tool-grid.tsx: Responsive search bar with shorter placeholder
- tldr-tool-grid.tsx: Tighter grid gaps on mobile (gap-4 → sm:gap-6)

Synergy Diagram Adjustments:
- Dynamic node sizing for 10 tools (smaller nodes prevent overlap)
- Increased radius from 140 to 155 for more tools
- Added gradient color mappings for DCG, RU, ACFS

Copy Quality Improvements (AI slop removal):
- Replaced em dashes with commas, semicolons, or colons throughout
- Removed "isn't just X—it's Y" patterns (BV, flywheel explanation)
- Recast sentences for natural, human-written tone
- RU shortName: "ru" → "RU" for consistency

about/page.tsx:
- Updated flywheel description from 7 to 13 tools
- Added mention of supporting tools category

tests/e2e/tldr.spec.ts:
- Updated expectations for new tool counts and categories

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

In late 2025, I started building what became the{" "} - + Agentic Coding Tooling Flywheel - : seven interconnected tools that transform how AI coding agents collaborate. + : thirteen interconnected tools that transform how AI coding agents collaborate. MCP Agent Mail lets agents message each other. Beads Viewer acts as a compass directing them on what to work on next. CASS Memory provides persistent context across sessions. Named Tmux Manager orchestrates multiple agents - simultaneously. Simultaneous Launch Button, Ultimate Bug Scanner, and - Coding Agent Session Search complete the ecosystem. Each tool amplifies + simultaneously. The ecosystem includes both core tools like Simultaneous Launch Button, + Ultimate Bug Scanner, and Coding Agent Session Search, plus supporting tools + like Dangerous Commands Guard, Cross-Repo Finder, and more. Each tool amplifies the others.
